hook: Most people think fasting glucose tests tell the whole story about blood sugar health. They miss a critical factor.

script.hook: Fasting glucose tests are common, but they can be misleading.
beats: Blood sugar isn't static; it fluctuates throughout the day based on meals, activity, and stress.
Continuous glucose monitoring reveals that individual responses to the same food can vary dramatically.
Ignoring post-meal glucose spikes can lead to long-term health issues, even if fasting levels seem normal.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a person taking a fasting glucose test.
Graph showing fluctuations in blood sugar levels throughout the day.
Footage of a continuous glucose monitor in action.
Simple animations illustrating the effects of post-meal glucose spikes.
